_note: Редакторские тексты карточек индекса. Размещение (published vs coming) генератор решает САМ по файловой системе - здесь только copy. Опубликованная статья не может попасть в stubs. Собирать: python3 tools/build-blog-index.py

featured_blurb.form-to-sheets-three-ways: Every guide picks one way to connect a form to a spreadsheet and calls it the answer. There are three, they all work, and each one fails in a specific place - Apps Script drops rows under load without a lock, a no-code bridge meets its price the month you get busy, a backend is real upkeep. Here is the map you read before you choose, and how to make any of them fail on a Tuesday you picked rather than in front of a customer.

blurbs.why-your-spreadsheet-total-is-wrong: A 60-second triage that names the cause, then the fix for each of the seven - including the two that never show an error.
blurbs.chatgpt-code-broke-on-real-data: It ran perfectly on ten sample rows and fell over on your actual file - or worse, did not fall over and handed you a number.
blurbs.import-said-success-rows-missing: The importer reported success and quietly skipped rows. How to find which ones, on a copy, before you touch the live catalog.
blurbs.form-said-thanks-email-never-came: The form showed a thank-you and the email never arrived. How to tell in a few minutes whether leads are dropping, and how to count the ones already gone.

stubs.title: Invoices from a spreadsheet row: the boring build that works
stubs.blurb: One template, one row, one click - and the guard formulas that stop a broken invoice reaching a client.

stubs.title: Google Sheets as a small CRM: where the limit really is
stubs.blurb: How far a spreadsheet carries your customer records, and when it's honest to say "time to move".

stubs.title: 404 after a migration: finding the cause before repairing anything
stubs.blurb: A read-only way to tell a redirect problem from a plugin problem from a server problem.
